title: hey guys, ncpia founder here, been working non stop and it's done. 3000+ global stocks live price screener added along with bug fixes & Institutional data.
author: OrchidProfessional54
selftext:
Hey guys. ik my last update may not be well received here as it was more of a fun feature. 

but this update is data related and serious. 

I know i said I'll keep NCPIA only for major assets like index forex n commodities, but many said it lacked atleast a component section for index where it shows live prices for companies in that index. 

i couldn't add it for one country as that would make the app biased so I added it for 50 Indices throughout the world. 

Also I added Institutional data where you can see Domestic Institutional investors (DII) & Foreign Institutional investors ( FII) data in stock market like how much are they buying or selling in different segments. 

Google Playstore:

https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ncpialtd.ncpia

I had to resubmit the App on IOS so y'all get this version btw. 

right now this FII DII data is added only for indian market as I am still learning how to get this data for american, european, south american, asia & oceanian stock markets. 

i got some research lined up but yeah I have provided an update with companies stock and the start of this FII DII DATA. 

rest the app had some performance issues so i fixed that. 

the voice command feature is improved, more accuracy & more commands for stocks. 

It's turning into such an amazing app man i am just happy bro. i love working on it. 

I know i ain't making money now at all on this, infact bleeding money on it cuz not enough users to cover Infra cost but as i said i ll keep it free with ads eventually I'll break even. i love working on it everyday. trying to provide the best for my users even tho i got less users right now. 

every one of you is valued

comments.author: Fast-Group3631
comments.body: just downloaded it to try, best of luck

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body: Welcome to the family ☺️ I hope you find the onboarding easy. If you got any doubts or wanna ask about a feature. I'm available at any time. Thanks for the goodluck wish 😄 you're so nice man.
